# Propensity-Score-Based Methods

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## The propensity score

_To be added._

## Including the propensity score in a regression model

_To be added._

## Propensity score matching

_To be added._

## Inverse probability weighting

_To be added._

## Other weighting methods

_To be added._

## Choosing among propensity-score methods

_To be added._
